summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3 new features: Logo (72px, -rotate-12), Streaming Services checkboxes (7 options), and full Watch History CRUD with JWT authentication. Backend: 23/23 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements working correctly with proper data-testids.
passed_tests: Logo: data-testid='chef-logo' present with img element having h-[72px] w-[72px] -rotate-12 classes
Backend: POST /api/user/watch-history adds movie with rating (0.1 increments) and watched_date
Backend: POST /api/user/watch-history on same tmdb_id appends new watch_date, updates rating, increments watch_count
Backend: GET /api/user/watch-history returns authenticated user's history sorted by last_watched_date desc
Backend: DELETE /api/user/watch-history/{tmdb_id} removes movie from history
Backend: PUT /api/user/watch-history/{tmdb_id} updates rating and adds watch dates
Backend: Rating validation (0-10 range with 0.1 increments)
Backend: Invalid rating (11.0) rejected with 422
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile accepts streaming_services array
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile saves all 7 streaming services
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns streaming_services field
Backend: GET /api/user/watch-history returns 401 without token
Backend: POST /api/user/watch-history returns 401 without token
Backend: DELETE /api/user/watch-history/{tmdb_id} returns 401 without token
Backend: PUT /api/user/watch-history/{tmdb_id} returns 401 without token
Backend: Invalid tokens rejected with 401
Frontend: Streaming Services section shows 7 checkboxes (netflix, prime, disney, hulu, apple, hbo, paramount)
Frontend: All streaming checkboxes have proper data-testid (streaming-checkbox-{id})
Frontend: Streaming checkboxes toggle correctly with checkmark indicator
Frontend: Watch History section present with search input (history-search-input)
Frontend: History search shows results with data-testid='history-result-{id}'
Frontend: Selecting search result shows add form with rating slider (history-rating-slider)
Frontend: Add form has date picker (history-date-input)
Frontend: Add form has confirm button (confirm-add-history-btn)
Frontend: Adding movie shows it in history list with data-testid='history-item-{tmdb_id}'
Frontend: History items show title, rating/10, and date
Frontend: Remove button visible on hover (remove-history-{tmdb_id})
Frontend: Removing movie removes it from list with toast notification
Frontend: Save Details button saves streaming_services to backend with toast 'Details saved'
critical_code_review_comments: Watch history CRUD properly scoped to authenticated users via JWT
Streaming services properly persisted in user profile
Rating slider accepts 0.1 increments as required
test_credentials: Unique test users created per test run with timestamp-based emails
seed_data_creation: None - tests create own data dynamically
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features tested and working: 1) Logo at 72px with -rotate-12, 2) Streaming Services with 7 checkboxes persisted to backend via PUT /api/auth/profile, 3) Full Watch History CRUD (add via search, rate 0-10 with 0.1 steps, pick date, multiple watch dates per movie, remove). Key data-testids: chef-logo, streaming-checkbox-{id}, history-search-input, history-result-{id}, history-rating-slider, history-date-input, confirm-add-history-btn, history-item-{tmdb_id}, remove-history-{tmdb_id}, save-details-btn. JWT auth required for all watch-history endpoints - token stored as 'chef_token' in localStorage.
